title: Clippit word convert result
description: Result payload of `clippit word to-html` or `clippit word from-html` written to stdout in JSON mode.

input.description: Absolute path of the source file (.docx for to-html, .html for from-html), or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

output.description: Absolute path of the generated file (.html for to-html, .docx for from-html), or '<stdout>' when written to stdout.

outputSize.description: Size of the generated output file in bytes.
